title: Re-Aesthetics
description: A modpack focused solely on enhancing Minecraft's visuals and beauty, improving textures, ambiance, lighting, and overall aesthetics.
body:
Re-Visuals is a modpack crafted to elevate Minecraft's visual and atmospheric experience. It focuses on subtle yet impactful changes that make the game feel more immersive and beautiful.

- Connected Texture : Seamless transitions between blocks for a polished look.

- Relief and Detail : Adds depth and 3D effects to some surfaces.

- Shaders : A specific shaders that sync well for Aesthetic

- Ambience Enhancements : Sounds, Atmosphere and global enhancements

- And a lot more

With some settings configuration, you can choose 2 type of gameplay.
1 - A vanilla like (With TAA shaders and specific Particles settings)
2 - An aesthetic looks (Atmospheric shaders and global enhancement)
